claims: The skill requests permission to run any AWS command via Bash (aws:*), which is excessively broad for a VPC network designer skill. While VPC design may involve interactions with other AWS services, granting blanket access to all AWS commands (e.g., for S3, Lambda, DynamoDB) is not strictly necessary for its stated purpose of building and designing VPC networks. A more minimal and secure approach would restrict permissions to VPC-related commands or specific AWS services relevant to network design.
